validations.rule: email and password are both required
validations.evidence: if (!email || !password) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'email and password are required' })

validations.rule: userName and password are both required
validations.evidence: return res.status(400).json({ succeeded: false, message: 'userName and password are required' })

validations.rule: name and phone are both required
validations.evidence: if (!name || !phone) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Name and phone are required' })

validations.rule: phone must be unique among active customers
validations.evidence: SELECT id FROM partners WHERE customer = true AND isdeleted = false AND phone = $1 LIMIT 1 => 409 if found

validations.rule: email must be unique among active customers when provided
validations.evidence: SELECT id FROM partners WHERE customer = true AND isdeleted = false AND email = $1 LIMIT 1 => 409 if found

validations.rule: at least one field must be provided for update
validations.evidence: if (updates.length === 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No fields to update' })

validations.rule: phone must be unique among active customers excluding current record
validations.evidence: SELECT id FROM partners WHERE customer = true AND isdeleted = false AND phone = $1 AND id != $2 LIMIT 1 => 409

validations.rule: email must be unique among active customers excluding current record
validations.evidence: SELECT id FROM partners WHERE customer = true AND isdeleted = false AND email = $1 AND id != $2 LIMIT 1 => 409

validations.rule: dateFrom must be a valid ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
validations.evidence: if (df && !isValidISODate(df)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DATE_FROM', ...)

validations.rule: dateTo must be a valid ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
validations.evidence: if (dt && !isValidISODate(dt)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DATE_TO', ...)

validations.rule: state filter must be one of VALID_STATES
validations.evidence: if (state && !VALID_STATES.includes(state)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_STATE', ...)

validations.rule: partner_id filter must be a valid UUID
validations.evidence: if (!isValidUUID(partner_id)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_PARTNER_ID', ...)

validations.rule: date, partnerId, and companyId are all required
validations.evidence: missingFields check => errorResponse(res, 400, 'MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS', ...)

validations.rule: date must be a valid ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss)
validations.evidence: if (!isValidISODate(date)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DATE', ...)

validations.rule: partnerId must be a valid UUID
validations.evidence: if (!isValidUUID(partnerId)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_PARTNER_ID', ...)

validations.rule: companyId must be a valid UUID
validations.evidence: if (!isValidUUID(companyId)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_COMPANY_ID', ...)

validations.rule: doctorId must be a valid UUID when provided
validations.evidence: if (doctorId && !isValidUUID(doctorId)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DOCTOR_ID', ...)

validations.rule: state must be one of VALID_STATES
validations.evidence: if (!VALID_STATES.includes(state)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_STATE', ...)

validations.rule: timeExpected must be an integer between 1 and 480 minutes
validations.evidence: if (isNaN(timeExpectedNum) || timeExpectedNum < 1 || timeExpectedNum > 480) return errorResponse(...)

validations.rule: partnerId must exist in partners table
validations.evidence: if (!(await foreignKeyExists('partners', partnerId))) return errorResponse(res, 404, 'PARTNER_NOT_FOUND', ...)

validations.rule: companyId must exist in companies table
validations.evidence: if (!(await foreignKeyExists('companies', companyId))) return errorResponse(res, 404, 'COMPANY_NOT_FOUND', ...)

validations.rule: doctorId must exist in employees table when provided
validations.evidence: if (doctorId && !(await foreignKeyExists('employees', doctorId))) return errorResponse(res, 404, 'DOCTOR_NOT_FOUND', ...)

validations.rule: id path param must be a valid UUID
validations.evidence: if (!isValidUUID(id)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_ID', ...)

validations.rule: date must be a valid ISO date when provided
validations.evidence: if (date !== undefined && !isValidISODate(date)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DATE', ...)

validations.rule: doctorId must be a valid UUID when provided
validations.evidence: if (!isValidUUID(doctorId)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_DOCTOR_ID', ...)

validations.rule: state must be one of VALID_STATES when provided
validations.evidence: if (state !== undefined && !VALID_STATES.includes(state)) return errorResponse(res, 400, 'INVALID_STATE', ...)

validations.rule: timeExpected must be between 1 and 480 minutes when provided
validations.evidence: if (isNaN(timeExpectedNum) || timeExpectedNum < 1 || timeExpectedNum > 480) return errorResponse(...)

validations.rule: doctorId must exist in employees table when provided
validations.evidence: if (doctorId !== undefined && !(await foreignKeyExists('employees', doctorId))) return errorResponse(res, 404, ...)

validations.rule: customer_id, amount, and method are all required
validations.evidence: if (!customer_id || amount === undefined || amount === null || !method || parseFloat(amount) <= 0) return res.status(400)...

validations.rule: payment amount must be positive (> 0)
validations.evidence: parseFloat(amount) <= 0 => res.status(400).json({ error: 'customer_id, positive amount, and method are required' })

validations.rule: each allocation's allocated_amount must not exceed the outstanding residual of its invoice or dotkham
validations.evidence: validateAllocationResidual(allocations) => checkInvoiceResidual / checkDotkhamResidual: if (amt > residual + 0.01) return 'Payment amount exceeds outstanding balance' => 400

validations.rule: customer_id, positive amount, and method are all required
validations.evidence: if (!customer_id || !amount || amount <= 0 || !method) return res.status(400)...

validations.rule: refund amount must be positive (> 0)
validations.evidence: amount <= 0 triggers 400 'customer_id, positive amount, and method are required'

validations.rule: at least one allowlisted field must be provided for update
validations.evidence: if (fields.length === 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No valid fields to update' })

validations.rule: payment status must be 'posted' to void; payments with other statuses return 404
validations.evidence: UPDATE payments SET status = 'voided' ... WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'posted' RETURNING *; rows=0 => 404 'Payment not found'

validations.rule: proofImageBase64 must be a non-empty string starting with 'data:image/'
validations.evidence: if (!proofImageBase64 || typeof proofImageBase64 !== 'string' || !proofImageBase64.startsWith('data:image/')) return res.status(400)...

validations.rule: partnerid is required
validations.evidence: if (!partnerid) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'partnerid is required' })

validations.rule: amounttotal must be >= 0
validations.evidence: if (parseFloat(amounttotal || 0) < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'amounttotal must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: quantity must be >= 0 when provided
validations.evidence: if (quantity != null && !isNaN(parseFloat(quantity)) && parseFloat(quantity) < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'quantity must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: state must be one of: sale, done, cancel, draft
validations.evidence: if (!state || !validStates.includes(state)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid state...' })

validations.rule: amounttotal must be >= 0 when provided
validations.evidence: if (amounttotal != null && parseFloat(amounttotal) < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'amounttotal must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: quantity must be >= 0 when provided
validations.evidence: if (quantity != null && !isNaN(parseFloat(quantity)) && parseFloat(quantity) < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'quantity must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: at least one field must be provided for update
validations.evidence: if (sets.length === 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No fields to update' })

validations.rule: customer_id and service_type are both required
validations.evidence: if (!customer_id || !service_type) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'customer_id and service_type are required' })

validations.rule: unit_price must be >= 0
validations.evidence: if (_up < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'unit_price must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: quantity must be >= 0
validations.evidence: if (_qty < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'quantity must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: discount must be >= 0
validations.evidence: if (_disc < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'discount must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: computed total (unit_price * quantity - discount) must be >= 0; discount must not exceed unit_price * quantity
validations.evidence: const total = _up * _qty - _disc; if (total < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'total_amount must be >= 0 (discount exceeds unit_price * quantity)' })

validations.rule: customer_id, total_amount, number_of_installments, and start_date are all required
validations.evidence: if (!customer_id || !total_amount || !number_of_installments || !start_date) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required fields' })

validations.rule: down_payment must be >= 0
validations.evidence: if (_dp < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'down_payment must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: down_payment must be strictly less than total_amount
validations.evidence: if (_dp >= _ta) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'down_payment must be less than total_amount' })

validations.rule: number_of_installments must be >= 1
validations.evidence: if (_n < 1) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'number_of_installments must be >= 1' })

validations.rule: installment_amount * number_of_installments must equal (total_amount - down_payment) within rounding tolerance of 0.5 * n
validations.evidence: const installment_sum = installment_amount * _n; if (Math.abs(installment_sum - (_ta - _dp)) > 0.5 * _n) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'installment sum does not equal total_amount - down_payment' })

validations.rule: at least one field or invoice_ids must be provided for update
validations.evidence: if (updates.length === 0 && !Array.isArray(invoice_ids)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No fields to update' })

validations.rule: down_payment must be >= 0 when provided
validations.evidence: if (newD < 0) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'down_payment must be >= 0' })

validations.rule: down_payment must be strictly less than total_amount when either is updated (merged with current values)
validations.evidence: if (newD >= newT) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'down_payment must be less than total_amount' })

validations.rule: cannot delete a plan that has any paid installments
validations.evidence: planHasPaidInstallments(client, id): SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM dbo.planinstallments WHERE plan_id=$1 AND status='paid'; count>0 => res.status(409).json({ error: 'Cannot delete plan with paid installments', invariant: 'monthlyPlan.noDelete-if-paid-installments' })

validations.evidence: if (!name || !name.trim()) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Name is required' })
